description: Beyond the Veil Patch 6 (13 March 2023) — Preparatory changes for the Albion East server launch on March 20, 2023. Spell cooldown fix.

sections.heading: Fixes
sections.description: This patch contains preparatory changes for the launch of the Albion East server on March 20, 2023.
items: Fixed rare issue where failed spell casts did not properly reset spell cooldowns
sections.searchable_text: Fixes spell cooldown failed casts reset Albion East server launch March 20 2023
